ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNORETTI, VINCENZO J

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2019 FOR HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN - OFF CALENDAR. DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN WAS ENTERED ON 10/24/18, AND THE DOE DEFENDANTS WERE DISMISSED ON 10/11/18. BUT, DEFENDANT JOHN'S JAGUAR FILED ITS GENERAL DENIAL ON 10/5/18, AND THE PARTIES WERE SERVED WITH THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL ON 1/2/19, SETTING A TRIAL DATE OF 7/22/19. THE COURT SHALL NOT ENTER A SEPARATE JUDGMENT AT THIS TIME AS THE RELIEF SOUGHT BY PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN WOULD REQUIRE AN ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT JOHN'S JAGUAR. PLAINTIFF VINCENZO J. SIGNORETTI WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MITCH L. LYON, CSR 6840. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3703. EMAIL: MLYON@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2019 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-22-2019 AT 9:40 AM IN DEPT. 306, JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER. A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON THIS CASE IS ALSO ASSIGNED TO JUDGE ULMER, WHICH THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF VINCENZO J. SIGNORETTI APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. IAIN ANGUS MACDONALD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. TIME ESTIMATE: 2 DAYS. JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
